\tzpentry{ID4540}{Coupled Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4540 introduces Coupled Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{H}_{SC} = \sum_{k} (\epsilon_k - \mu) (\Creation{k\uparrow} \Annihilation{k\uparrow} + \Creation{k\downarrow} \Annihilation{k\downarrow}) + \Delta \sum_k (\Creation{k\uparrow} \Creation{-k\downarrow} + h.c.) \end{equation}
